title: CLOTHING AND TOYS CLOSET - 211info
text: NEXT DOOR CLOTHING AND TOYS CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers children's clothing, toys and supplies. 965 Tucker Road Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Open to any families that would like to either donate or take gently used baby clothing, toys, and baby equipment. Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 10 am-12pm and 1-3pm Email (541) 386-6665 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 386-6665 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Hood River and Wasco Counties Services: Baby Clothing Children's Clothing Clothing Donation Programs Toy Libraries/Toy Loan Programs Toy/Game Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - HEALTH PROMOTION AND CHRONIC DISEASE PREVENTION EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - SUMMER CAMPS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - GORGE YOUTH MENTORING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTH PROMOTION SERVICES/NUESTRA COMUNIDAD SANA INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - MID-COLUMBIA HEALTH EQUITY ADVOCATES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH FAMILY SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - TREATMENT SERVICES SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - COLUMBIA GORGE PRIDE ALLIANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NEXT DOOR
